flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Chestnut Hill College fell 38% between 2021 and 2024 (56.3% → 34.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Chestnut Hill College fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0k → 815).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Chestnut Hill College fell 15% between 2006 and 2009 (51.9% → 44.1%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Chestnut Hill College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($23.6k → $27.1k).
